name: Observer Activated Torch
description: Build a circuit where an observer detects a block placement and activates a redstone torch or lamp. Place an observer facing a block, and connect its output to a redstone lamp.
hints: Observer has a front (with eyes) and back (with redstone dot)
Observer outputs signal from the back when it detects a change in front
Place a block in front of the observer's face
Connect redstone from observer back to lamp

verification.action: Break and replace the block in front of observer
verification.expected_result: Lamp should flash on when observer detects the change
